_comment: Commissioner fills this in after the draft. Map each drafted team to its player. Keys may be a football-data.org team ID (preferred, e.g. "760") OR a team name exactly as it appears in pots.json (e.g. "Spain"). Players: Drew, Eriku, Rain, Andy, Dev, Gav, Rea. 42 of 48 teams get drafted (~6 each). 'manualOverrides' optionally forces a team's furthest stage if the API ever mislabels something: key = team id or name, value = stage name (GROUP_STAGE | LAST_32 | LAST_16 | QUARTER_FINALS | SEMI_FINALS | FINAL | CHAMPION).
